title: Peristylus cordatus
taxonomy: Peristylus cordatus is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which comprises the orchids. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae, a group of orchids characterized by a unique type of leaf structure and flower arrangement. The genus Peristylus is part of the tribe Orchideae, which comprises a diverse group of orchids. Within the genus, Peristylus cordatus is further distinguished by its distinctive characteristics, such as its floral morphology and leaf shape. Further research may be necessary to determine its exact classification within the broader orchid family.
